Who We Are

About JDS

A DMV-based residential construction company built on craftsmanship, transparency, and solid faith in the work we do.

Our Story

Built on Faith,
Driven by Craft

JDS Contractors Inc. was founded with one belief: that a home is the most important investment a family makes, and it deserves to be built with the care and precision that reflects that.

Over 15+ years serving the DMV, we've built 500+ homes, completed 250+ additions, and built a reputation for showing up, doing the work right, and not closing a project until it's done.

Headquartered in Laurel, MD, we operate throughout Maryland, Washington DC, Northern Virginia, and select projects in Delaware, Pennsylvania, and West Virginia.

What We Stand For

Our Values

Solid Faith

Our tagline isn't marketing — it's how we operate. We take our commitments seriously, to our clients and to the quality of every home we build.

Transparency First

Fixed-price bids, clear timelines, and honest communication at every stage. No surprises. No hidden costs. No excuses.

Craft Over Speed

We don't rush. Every milestone gets done right before we move to the next. That's why our punch lists are short and our clients come back.

Our Crew

The People Behind The Work

Ready to Build Together?

Tell us about your project and we'll get you a fixed-price quote within 48 hours.
